file_name: Mahumud et al. - 2022 - Assessing the value of precision medicine health technologies to detect and manage melanoma.json

did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a perspective article discussing the potential of precision medicine technologies, including AI-driven algorithms, for melanoma detection and management. It references existing AI studies (e.g., deep neural networks for skin cancer classification) and proposes future use of AI for lesion identification, but it does not report original research results obtained by applying AI methods in this study.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
